title: Music from Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
display_title: Music from Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
html:
Music from Evangelion: 1.0
You Are (Not) Alone
Publisher
  • Japan King Records/Starchild
Release Date
  • Japan May 25, 2008
Media Type Audio CD
Author Shiro Sagisu

Music from Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone is the first soundtrack album (followed by Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone Original Soundtrack) featuring music from the film Evangelion 1.0: You Are (Not) Alone, composed by Shirō Sagisu. The album peaked at number 28 in the Oricon database, making 6 appearances in total. All tracks featured on the album are presented in their entirety, without being edited for film length. Most of the songs are new versions of background music from the original Evangelion animated television series. The score was recorded by the London Studio Orchestra at Abbey Road Studios in London, England.

The album was released on September 25, 2007 by Starchild. The executive producers are Hideaki Anno and Toshimichi Otsuki while Shiro Sagisu produced the music (acting also as the composer and conductor) and Tomohiro Ogawa.
